eventPreCondition: Play if a Free Peoples Army containing a Companion is adjacent to, or is in the same region as, a Shadow Army containing Nazgul.
eventText:
Roll a die for each Nazgul present (up to a maximum of five dice) and eliminate a Nazgul for each roll of 5+.
All surviving Nazgul must immediately be moved to any one unconquered Sauron Stronghold.
The Witch-king is not considered a Nazgul for the purposes of this card.
combatPreCondition: Play if a Free Peoples Leader or a Companion is in the battle.
combatText:
Before you remove casualties inflicted by your opponent's Combat roll and Leader re-roll, you may eliminate one of your Leaders to cancel one hit, or eliminate one
Companion to cancel a number of hits equal to or less than the Companion's Level.
